description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a gable roof covered in light tan shingles, set on a rectangular green lawn. The front facade features a small covered entryway supported by two columns, flanked by two large wall-mounted panels displaying images. The exterior walls are painted white, and there are several large windows, including a prominent one on the right side of the building. The roof has a moderate overhang, providing shade to the windows and entryway. The structure appears compact and functional, with a simple, clean design typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A white, single-story bungalow with a tan gable roof, large windows, and a small covered entryway, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered entryway, two supporting columns, and wall-mounted panels with images.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, a large window, and the depth of the entryway; wall panels are visible to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain white wall with no windows or doors, and the full span of the gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a large window and the wall panels positioned at the edge of the lawn.
